creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
The Porter's Handbook section 6.5.4 "Using cmake" references a deleted port deskutils/strigi as an example.
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/building.html#using-cmake
https://www.freshports.org/deskutils/strigi

Given this port is no longer available, this example should either be removed or an alternative port should be referenced as an example.
